defaulDiwali.title: Dilli Diwali Mela
defaulDiwali.description: Celebrate the Festival of Lights at the grandest Diwali Mela in North India. Enjoy 200+ stalls of artisanal crafts, street food, folk performances, fireworks, and cultural showcases spanning three vibrant evenings.

defaultMonsoon.title: Hollywood Monsoon Night — Los Angeles
defaultMonsoon.description: An unforgettable evening of live music performed by A-list playback singers under the open Mumbai sky. Featuring chart-toppers from the last three decades with a stunning light show and pyrotechnics.

defaultSummit.title: World Tech Summit
defaultSummit.description: A premier technology conference bringing together 500+ industry leaders, startup founders, and engineers for two days of keynotes, workshops, and networking. Topics include AI/ML, cloud infrastructure, DevSecOps, and the future of the Indian tech ecosystem.

techSummit.title: Global Tech Summit 2026
techSummit.description: A premier technology conference bringing together 500+ industry leaders, startup founders, and engineers.

diwaliCarnival.title: Grand Diwali Carnival
diwaliCarnival.description: Experience the vibrant lights, traditional food, and cultural performances of North India.

rockConcert.title: Rock Underground Live
rockConcert.description: An evening of alternative rock featuring local indie bands and guest performers.

artWorkshop.title: Modern Art Workshop
artWorkshop.description: Learn the basics of abstract painting from award-winning artists in a 4-hour intensive session.

iplFinals.title: IPL Pro League Finals
iplFinals.description: Watch the top two teams battle for the championship trophy in an electric atmosphere with live commentary.
